shell.subhead: A few details about how you sell and who you serve help us tune simulations and your AI voice before you go live.
shell.feature1: Industry from your account — asked once at sign-up
shell.feature2: Practice scenarios match your vertical automatically
shell.feature3: You can refine everything later in Settings
shell.footer: Secure, AI-powered lead warm-up for your business

progress.questionnaireDesc: How you sell and who you serve

default.serviceDescription: e.g., Quarterly planning workshops, operational audits, leadership coaching for scaling teams
default.targetClient: e.g., Founders, COOs, heads of operations at 50–300 person companies
default.commonQuestions: e.g., 'What does week one look like?', 'Can you work alongside our internal team?'
default.serviceArea: e.g., US Eastern time zone, hybrid in major metros

legalServices.serviceDescription: e.g., Outside counsel for startups, contract drafting and review, employment policies and handbooks
legalServices.targetClient: e.g., Seed–Series B founders, HR leaders, real estate investors closing acquisitions
legalServices.commonQuestions: e.g., 'What do you need to start a contract review?', 'How fast can you turn around an NDA?'
legalServices.certifications: e.g., Admitted to California Bar, Certified Privacy Professional (CIPP/US)

constructionContracting.serviceDescription: e.g., Kitchen and bathroom remodeling, custom cabinetry, general contracting for residential projects
constructionContracting.targetClient: e.g., Homeowners, property investors, small commercial landlords
constructionContracting.commonQuestions: e.g., 'Do you handle permits?', 'How long does a kitchen remodel take?'
constructionContracting.certifications: e.g., Licensed General Contractor — California, EPA Lead-Safe Certified
constructionContracting.serviceArea: e.g., San Francisco Bay Area, Marin County

realEstateServices.serviceDescription: e.g., Buyer and seller representation, relocation support, investment property analysis
realEstateServices.targetClient: e.g., First-time buyers, relocating executives, investors building rental portfolios
realEstateServices.budget: e.g., Typical home prices you focus on: $450k–$900k in your farm area
realEstateServices.commonQuestions: e.g., 'How many offers should we expect?', 'What closing costs should we budget?'
realEstateServices.serviceArea: e.g., Austin metro, downtown condos and nearby suburbs

financialAdvisory.serviceDescription: e.g., Retirement income planning, portfolio management, equity-comp and concentrated-stock strategies
financialAdvisory.targetClient: e.g., Pre-retirees 55+, tech employees with RSUs, small-business owners planning exit
financialAdvisory.commonQuestions: e.g., 'Are you a fiduciary?', 'How do you handle a large single-stock position?'
financialAdvisory.serviceArea: e.g., Remote U.S., in-person meetings in Chicago

businessConsulting.serviceDescription: e.g., Go-to-market for B2B SaaS, pricing and packaging, sales playbook and discovery training
businessConsulting.targetClient: e.g., Series A–B startups, PE-backed roll-ups, VP Sales with a lean team
businessConsulting.commonQuestions: e.g., 'What access do we get between working sessions?', 'Can you join our QBR?'
businessConsulting.certifications: e.g., MBA, HubSpot Sales Software certified
businessConsulting.serviceArea: e.g., North America, hybrid on-site + remote

marketingCreative.serviceDescription: e.g., Brand identity, paid social and search, content retainers, launch campaigns for D2C brands
marketingCreative.targetClient: e.g., E-commerce founders, marketing leads at mid-market brands, funded startups
marketingCreative.commonQuestions: e.g., 'Who owns the ad accounts?', 'How often do we get reporting and creative rounds?'
marketingCreative.certifications: e.g., Google Ads Partner, Meta Blueprint certified
marketingCreative.serviceArea: e.g., US & EU time zones, remote-first studio

homeServices.serviceDescription: e.g., HVAC tune-ups and repairs, annual maintenance plans, emergency same-day service
homeServices.targetClient: e.g., Homeowners, property managers, small retail and office tenants
homeServices.budget: e.g., $150–$350 service calls, $5k–$15k full system replacements
homeServices.commonQuestions: e.g., 'Do you offer same-day appointments?', 'What warranty do you provide on parts and labor?'
homeServices.certifications: e.g., EPA 608 Universal, state HVAC contractor license

healthWellness.serviceDescription: e.g., 1:1 nutrition coaching, habit and accountability coaching, 12-week transformation programs
healthWellness.targetClient: e.g., Busy professionals, postpartum parents, recreational endurance athletes
healthWellness.commonQuestions: e.g., 'Do you accept HSA/FSA?', 'What is your cancellation policy?'
healthWellness.serviceArea: e.g., Online worldwide, in-person in South Florida

itTechnology.serviceDescription: e.g., Managed IT for 20–250 seats, Microsoft 365 migration, endpoint security and backup
itTechnology.targetClient: e.g., Office managers, IT-light CTOs, professional services and healthcare clinics
itTechnology.commonQuestions: e.g., 'What is your SLA for critical outages?', 'Do you support Mac and Windows equally?'
itTechnology.certifications: e.g., CompTIA Security+, Microsoft Solutions Partner — Modern Work
itTechnology.serviceArea: e.g., Southern California on-site, remote nationwide NOC

interiorDesign.serviceDescription: e.g., Full-service residential design, furnishings and procurement, kitchen and bath concept development
interiorDesign.targetClient: e.g., Homeowners on primary-residence remodels, custom home builders, boutique multifamily developers
interiorDesign.budget: e.g., $8k–$25k design fees per major space, $75k+ whole-home design and procurement
interiorDesign.commonQuestions: e.g., 'Is your fee hourly or flat?', 'How do you coordinate with our architect and contractor?'
interiorDesign.serviceArea: e.g., Metro Atlanta, Southeast U.S. travel

questionnaire.pageSubtitle: Industry is already saved from registration. The rest helps us tailor simulations and your AI profile.
questionnaire.footer: This takes about 3 minutes. You can always update this information later.
questionnaire.missingIndustry: Your account needs a valid industry. Open Settings → Business profile, choose your industry, save, then return to this page.

form.factsIntro: This information helps create more realistic practice scenarios
form.industryFromAccount: Your industry is the one you chose when you created your account. It drives which practice scenarios you see. To change it, go to Settings → Business profile after onboarding.
form.targetClientHint: Who do you typically work with?
form.budgetHint: What's your typical project budget range?
form.commonQuestionsHint: What do clients usually ask you?

validation.serviceDescriptionMin: Service description must be at least 10 characters
validation.targetClientMin: Target client type must be at least 5 characters
validation.questionsMin: At least one common client question is required
validation.addOneQuestion: Please add at least one common client question
